name: Aave

model.note: GP = Aave TVL x NET revenue yield on TVL (protocol reserve-factor revenue / TVL — real today, unlike Morpho). TVL path: lending/yield-basket denominator x Aave MS90 share (70/30 velocity ensemble, decay 12M, cap 45%); basket shocks dampened 0.65, capped -8%/+10%. Primary = current-state revenue yield (~0.5%); 18x GP multiple (highest of the three — only token with real cash + immutable systematic buyback + multi-channel accrual, has traded ~17-20x revenue); AAVE ~95% circulating. Aavenomics buyback (~$1M/wk) reported as supporting context, not added to GP.

current_gp.supply_basis: AAVE ~95% circulating of 16M; only the small Ecosystem Reserve releases slowly. ~Fully diluted. FDV=16M.

mc_path.rule: sample starting lending/yield-basket TVL; apply sampled monthly shocks (dampened 0.65, capped -8%/+10%); seed Aave MS90 share and grow with 70/30 velocity ensemble decaying over 12M (cap 45%); Aave TVL = basket TVL x share; GP = Aave TVL x net revenue yield

caveats: Aave earns REAL protocol revenue today (reserve-factor cut of borrower interest); current-state is the primary case, not an activation story.
Net revenue yield = DefiLlama Aave V3 dailyRevenue / TVL. GHO stablecoin interest accrues to the treasury and is captured in the margin-expansion scenario, not the base.
Aave V3 TVL dropped sharply during the 2026-04 market crash; current revenue yield is point-in-time and reserve factors vary by asset (cyclical).
Aavenomics buyback (~$1M/wk ≈ $52M/yr) supports the token but is reported as context, not added to GP (avoids double-counting protocol revenue).

Lending/yield TVL denominator distribution is locked (53 monthly obs, 2022-01..2026-05); Aave's own TVL/revenue/price are live. 18x GP multiple (highest accrual quality of the three; Aave has traded ~17-20x revenue), no separate OPEX line.

secondary_chart.label: Historical Mcap / current-state revenue
secondary_chart.subtitle: Market cap ÷ (Aave TVL × net revenue yield)
secondary_chart.note: Annualized current-state protocol revenue proxy on Aave TVL; net revenue yield held constant.
